channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: DEAD FOX ON BARRY ROAD b219, 6th July
item.description:
Dead fox on barry road. in front of bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.description:
Foliage issues on poles 5 phases A and C, pole 6 phase C.

item.description:
Please inspect paving here.

item.title: Pavement and tree pit issue - please inspect, 6th July
item.description:
Can this be inspected and made good?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please grind out this stump so it can be replanted, 6th July
item.description:
I reported this dead tree a year ago - please grind out the stump so it can be replanted in planting season

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadside control box damaged by vehicle impact : on pavement outside Shepherds Foods shop, 6th July
item.description:
Roadside control box damaged by vehicle impact : on pavement outside Shepherds Foods shop Needs straightening and re-fixing *** This box is hit every few months and is sited vulnerably. I have asked before that the Roads Engineer provides a protective metal bollard to prevent lay-by vehicles reversing into this box time and time again See photographs Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Blackheath Village, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Posters on Wickham Street, 6th July
item.description:
Two ProPave Drives and Patios posters Location #1: Shoulder of Mutton Green fence opposite Sandringham Drive. Location #2: Sign post outside Shoulder of Mutton Green fence near to junction with Bellegrove Road junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Street, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No mot and no tax, 6th July
item.description:
The car has no mot or tax and is being driven i noticed it on Thursday and has been driven for over a month with no mot or tax with no regard for other road users.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-32, Palace Square, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking near corner of Quernmore Road and Park Avenue, 6th July
item.description:
The van has been parked for over a month in a way that impedes vision for drivers looking right along Park Avenue when exiting Quernmore Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Park Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poison Hemlock, 6th July
item.description:
Poison Hemlock growing on the edge of Clapham Common, highly toxic to people and animals

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mirror-like A-board left centrally and obstructing Station Approach footway near Beckenham Jct Station., 5th July
item.description:
Mirror-like A-board left centrally and obstructing Station Approach footway near Beckenham Jct Station. It seems to relate to a cafe with the frontage on Southend Rd. It was blown over by the wind and left flat on the footway during 5 mins of observation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Estate agent board cabletied to the Apex Close street name plate at the jct with The Avenue, Beckenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Apex Close, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Estate agent board (Grafton Estates, from memory) cabletied to the Silverwood street name plate at the jct with Brackley Rd, Beckenham., 5th July
item.description:
Estate agent board (Grafton Estates, from memory) cabletied to the Silverwood street name plate at the jct with Brackley Rd, Beckenham. There may be a second board opposite. Seen from moving vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverwood Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On a lamp column in High St Beckenham, fronting St George's Church is a Revel Puck human circus flyposter., 5th July
item.description:
On a lamp column in High St Beckenham, fronting St George's Church is a Revel Puck human circus flyposter. .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Revel Puck human circus flyposters affixed to the zebra crossing guard railings in Worsley Bridge Rd about 20m from the jct with Brackley Rd, Beckenham., 5th July
item.description:
Two Revel Puck human circus flyposters affixed to the zebra crossing guard railings in Worsley Bridge Rd about 20m from the jct with Brackley Rd, Beckenham. This is a busy location by Worsley Bridge Primary School and the 'Visirails' are meant to be clear for road safety views. There is other flyposting in Beckenham too for this circus in Lewisham Borough. It was prolific in a previous year too.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tall green telecomms cabinet in Blakeney Rd 5m from jct with Rectory Rd, Beckenham (adjoining Bouverie Lodge flats) has new tags and old ones showing through., 5th July
item.description:
Tall green telecomms cabinet in Blakeney Rd 5m from jct with Rectory Rd, Beckenham (adjoining Bouverie Lodge flats) has new tags and old ones showing through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blakeney Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass in the road, 5th July
item.description:
Lots of shards of glass nearish the side of the road all the way up the hill on the south side of the road. A huge hazard to cyclist's tyres
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Alexandra Park Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish outside blue garage, 5th July
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish outside blue garage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Egerton Drive, Greenwich

item.title: 36 Lordship Lane-Flyipping, 5th July
item.description:
Wooden pellatt obstructing the pavement all of last week. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36-38, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (opposite car wash) 10th complaint, 5th July
item.description:
10th Complaint: It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping/non-removal of a toilet tank lid. Nothing is being done about its removal and it will encourage more flytipping. The fact that it is a street full of young children and the health and safety is dismissed is shocking. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law towards the organisation or residence in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal, where it will encourage unhygienic practices.This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
